title: Pacific NW essential
review_text: Perfect for Seattle drizzle runs. Blocks wind completely and sheds light rain. Packs into its own pocket which is genius for mid-run weather changes.

title: DWR wore off fast
review_text: Loved this jacket for the first 3 months. Then the water repellency stopped working. Had to buy DWR spray to restore it. Jacket itself is great but the coating should last longer.

title: Reflective trim is great
review_text: I run at 5 AM and the reflective trim on this jacket makes me very visible. Wind protection is excellent. Just runs warm above 50 degrees.
